title: account/get_orders response + orders push (AFB-only; not part of afb.execution.v1 wire)
description: Pure proxy of BF's `broker.orders` payload (see belphegor/proxy.py). `data` untyped for the same reason as account.snapshot.v1.json — BF owns the shape, unschematized on the wire.
